---
title: "Julián Martínez"
about:
  template: solana
  image: ./assets/img/prof_pic.jpg
  image-width: 10em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/julianmartinezfm7/
      
    # - icon: github
    #   text: Github
    #   href: https://github.com/julianfm7

---

# About Me

I am a data scientist, with a strong background in statistics, machine learning, and mathematical modeling. 
I help turn complex, uncertain data problems into statistical models, decision tools, and reproducible analytical workflows.


I have transitioned from an [academic career](./assets/subpages/academic.qmd) to consulting, where I have applied my [skills](./assets/subpages/skills.qmd) to solve problems in different industries.
You can see a summary of my [experience](./assets/subpages/experience.qmd). 

For further details, please check my [cv](./assets/cv/Julian_Martinez_en_CV.pdf) ([french version](./assets/cv/Julian_Martinez_fr_CV.pdf)).

### Current Interests

I am currently expanding my expertise in Bayesian statistics, causal inference, and decision science.
Some of the [domains](./assets/subpages/domains.qmd) that I am currently exploring include biostatistics, animal nutrition, electricity markets, and supply chain optimization.

---

Some of my [working principles](./assets/subpages/my_principles.qmd) summarize how I approach data science and analytics work.


The way we approach problems is often influenced by the people we learn from.
[This page](./assets/subpages/influences.qmd) gathers some of the people that shape my approach to data science.
